scripts.codegen: npm run permissions:generate && npm run domain:generate && npm run miniprogram:env
scripts.codegen:check: npm run permissions:check && npm run domain:check && npm run miniprogram:env:check && npm run web:policy:check && npm run api:artifacts:check && npm run api:contract:check
scripts.miniprogram:env:openapi: cross-env USE_MOCK=false MOCK_MODE=openapi API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:4010/api/v1 node scripts/codegen/miniprogram-env.mjs
scripts.api:export-and-generate: npm run openapi:export && npm run api:generate
